'''dhathosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherworking|featherworking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherworking|featherworking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhathosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæthesheth|dhæthesheth]] || [[word:dhætheshej|dhætheshej]] || [[word:dhætheshesh|dhætheshesh]] || [[word:dhætheshe|dhætheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhathothoshoth|dhathothoshoth]] || [[word:dhathothoshoj|dhathothoshoj]] || [[word:dhathothoshosh|dhathothoshosh]] || [[word:dhathothosho|dhathothosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhathoshoth|dhathoshoth]] || [[word:dhathoshoj|dhathoshoj]] || [[word:dhathoshosh|dhathoshosh]] || [[word:dhathosho|dhathosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhathofshoth|dhathofshoth]] || [[word:dhathofshoj|dhathofshoj]] || [[word:dhathofshosh|dhathofshosh]] || [[word:dhathofshof|dhathofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhathoshotho|dhathoshotho]] || [[word:dhathoshojo|dhathoshojo]] || [[word:dhathoshosho|dhathoshosho]] || [[word:dhathoshoko|dhathoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhathoshoth|dhathoshoth]] || [[word:dhathoshoj|dhathoshoj]] || [[word:dhathoshosh|dhathoshosh]] || [[word:dhathosho|dhathosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhathoshothol|dhathoshothol]] || [[word:dhathoshojol|dhathoshojol]] || [[word:dhathoshoshol|dhathoshoshol]] || [[word:dhathoshokol|dhathoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhathoshothotho|dhathoshothotho]] || [[word:dhathoshojojo|dhathoshojojo]] || [[word:dhathoshoshosho|dhathoshoshosho]] || [[word:dhathoshoko|dhathoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhathoshothon|dhathoshothon]] || [[word:dhathoshojon|dhathoshojon]] || [[word:dhathoshoshon|dhathoshoshon]] || [[word:dhathoshokon|dhathoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhathoshothoro|dhathoshothoro]] || [[word:dhathoshojoro|dhathoshojoro]] || [[word:dhathoshoshoro|dhathoshoshoro]] || [[word:dhathoshokoro|dhathoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
